top_ranked_priorities: Purchased-metal emissions | Factory energy efficiency | Supplier data quality

prototype_metric: Product carbon estimate, defect rate, unit cost and lead time

top_ranked_priorities: Unsupported claims | Supply-chain traceability | Overproduction and returns
prototype_hypothesis: Verified material-impact information will improve sourcing decisions without delaying the product cycle.
prototype_metric: Traceable source percentage, decision time, material cost, estimated impact and user confidence

top_ranked_priorities: Climate-risk integration | Financed emissions evidence | Fairness of green lending criteria
prototype_hypothesis: A sustainability decision prompt during SME loan review improves climate-risk consideration without unfair exclusion.
prototype_metric: Completion rate, decision time, evidence quality, approval outcomes, fairness concerns and user confidence
